title: Consumer Education - Canada.ca
content:
To order any of the following resources, please contact the Consumer Product Safety Directorate by calling our toll-free line 1-866-662-0666, by email CPS-SPC@hc-sc.gc.ca , or by fax 613-952-1880.

- Second-hand Products
